capabilities.label: AMD SEV-SNP (EPYC Milan / Genoa)
capabilities.notes: AMD SEV-SNP confidential VM. Attestation report verifiable against AMD root key.

capabilities.label: Android (Snapdragon 8 Gen 3) / Galaxy S24 Ultra
capabilities.notes: Hexagon NPU. Use MediaPipe LLM Inference API. Max practical: Gemma 3n E2B, Gemma 3 1B Q4.

capabilities.label: Apple M3 Max
capabilities.notes: MLX-native training via mlx_lm. No CUDA stack.

capabilities.label: AWS Nitro Enclave
capabilities.notes: AWS Nitro Enclave isolated from parent EC2. Attestation via /dev/nsm + KMS.

capabilities.label: Generic x86_64 CPU
capabilities.notes: llama.cpp Q4. Max practical: 3B at ~5 tok/s.

capabilities.label: Samsung Galaxy S24 Ultra
capabilities.notes: 12GB physical RAM, Snapdragon 8 Gen 3 for Galaxy. Verified hosts: Gemma 3n E2B.

capabilities.label: Intel TDX (Ice Lake / Sapphire Rapids)
capabilities.notes: Intel TDX trust domain. Attestation via PCCS / Intel Trust Authority. CPU-only inference inside the TD.

capabilities.label: iPhone 15 Pro / 16 Pro
capabilities.notes: A17 Pro Neural Engine. Use Q4_K_M GGUF or MLC. Verified hosts: Gemma 3n E2B, Qwen 2.5 1.5B Q4.

capabilities.label: iPhone 16 Pro / 17 Pro
capabilities.notes: A18 Pro Neural Engine. Max practical: Gemma 3n E2B, Qwen 2.5 1.5B Q4.

capabilities.label: NVIDIA Jetson AGX Orin 64GB
capabilities.notes: 275 TOPS. Capable of QLoRA on 7B at the edge.

capabilities.label: NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano 8GB (Super)
capabilities.notes: Unified memory (CPU+GPU share 8GB LPDDR5). 67 TOPS. Run Qwen 2.5 3B Q4 ~25 tok/s.

capabilities.label: Laptop iGPU (Intel / AMD)
capabilities.notes: DirectML or ONNX Runtime. Q4 only. Max: 1.5B params.

capabilities.label: NVIDIA H100 in Confidential Compute mode
capabilities.notes: H100 CC mode pairs with TDX or SEV-SNP host. Attestation via NRAS (NVIDIA Remote Attestation Service).

capabilities.label: Pixel 8 Pro / 9 Pro
capabilities.notes: Tensor G3/G4 NPU via MediaPipe. Verified hosts: Gemma 3n E2B, Gemma 3 1B Q4.

capabilities.label: Pixel 9 Pro (Tensor G4)
capabilities.notes: Tensor G4 + AICore. AICore exposes Gemini Nano 1.5/2.0 via system SDK. Max sideloaded: Gemma 3n E2B.

capabilities.label: Raspberry Pi 5 (8GB)
capabilities.notes: CPU-only. Cortex-A76 quad. Max practical: SmolLM2 1.7B Q4 ~3 tok/s, Gemma 3 1B Q4 ~2 tok/s.

capabilities.label: NVIDIA RTX 5090
capabilities.notes: Local dev rig. FA3 + FP4 inference + NVFP4 training (with torch ≥ 2.8).

capabilities.label: WASM (browser, Cloudflare Worker)
capabilities.notes: transformers.js ONNX Q4. Max practical: 500M params.
Apache 2.0 alternate for ~7B class. Smaller context than Qwen 2.5 7B.
Apache 2.0 alternate for tiny tier. English only.
Apache 2.0 compact 3B student. Prefer when small artifact size and permissive licensing matter more than Qwen tokenizer continuity.
Current 1.2B edge/agentic student. License is LFM-1.0, not Apache/MIT, so permissive filters correctly exclude it.

capabilities.modality_notes: Hermes 4.3 dense; strong tool-use + steerable persona.

capabilities.notes: Phone / Raspberry Pi / WASM. Fastest inference; weakest reasoning.
Laptop iGPU / Apple Silicon 8GB. Solid SFT target for classifiers.
Server-class. A100-40GB / H100. Best K-score in tests at 14B.

capabilities.notes: DEFAULT. Apache 2.0, strong tool/JSON, fits in 8GB consumer GPU.

capabilities.modality_notes: Gemma 3 27B instruction model; official image+text input and 128K context.

verification_evidence.verifier_note: Official Google Gemma 3 docs list 27B, image+text input, 128K context, and responsible commercial use; HF revision not pinned (warn-band).

capabilities.notes: Closest match to the "Gemma 3B" target user referenced. Image+text input.
On-device Gemma. Official 32K context. Per-Layer Embeddings: 2B effective, 5B raw weights; text, image, audio, and video inputs.
On-device Gemma. Official 32K context. 4B effective, 8B raw weights; text, image, audio, and video inputs.
Text-only MedGemma. 128K input context, 8192 output tokens. Best benchmark scores in family; A100-40GB+ class.
Medical-tuned Gemma 3 4B. Vision+text input, 128K input context, 8192 output tokens. Not for direct clinical decisions; require local eval + clinician review.
Pretrained (not instruction-tuned). 128K input context, 8192 output tokens. Use as base for domain SFT/LoRA.
